en.sidebar_title:
Research Fellow
Harbin Institute of Technology, Shenzhen

zh.sidebar_title:
博士后
哈尔滨工业大学（深圳）

about.en:
I received my B.Eng. and D.Eng. (Hons.) degrees from the School of Electronics and Communication Engineering, Sun Yat-sen University (SYSU), China, in 2021 and 2026, respectively, under the supervision of Prof. Yanqun Tang. From July 2025 to March 2026, I was a visiting Ph.D. student at the Wireless Research Lab, New York University (NYU) Abu Dhabi, supervised by Prof. Marwa Chafii. I am joining Harbin Institute of Technology, Shenzhen (HIT Shenzhen) as a Research Fellow under Prof. Qinyu Zhang. My research interests include advanced waveform design for Affine Frequency Division Multiplexing (AFDM), channel estimation, and Integrated Sensing and Communications (ISAC) for next-generation satellite and low-altitude wireless networks.

Google Scholar  ·  580+ citations  ·  h-index = 11  ·  i10-index = 18
about.zh:
我分别于2021年和2026年在中山大学电子与通信工程学院获得工学学士和博士学位，导师为唐燕群教授。2025年7月至2026年3月，受国家留学基金委（CSC）资助，赴纽约大学（阿布扎比主校区）无线通信实验室开展联合培养，导师为Marwa Chafii教授。我即将加入哈尔滨工业大学（深圳）担任博士后，合作导师张钦宇教授。我的研究方向包括：面向仿射频分复用（AFDM）的先进波形设计、信道估计、以及面向下一代卫星通信与低空无线网络的通信感知一体化（ISAC）。

Google Scholar  ·  580+次引用  ·  h-index = 11  ·  i10-index = 18

advisor.zh: 唐燕群教授（广东省海空天通信重点实验室副主任）

thesis.en: Research on Key Technologies of Affine Frequency Division Multiplexing Systems for High-Mobility Scenarios
thesis.zh: 面向高动态场景的仿射频分复用系统关键技术研究

news.en: Joining Harbin Institute of Technology, Shenzhen (HIT Shenzhen) as a Research Fellow.
news.zh: 即将加入哈尔滨工业大学（深圳），担任博士后。

news.en: Received Doctor of Engineering (D.Eng.) degree from Sun Yat-sen University.
news.zh: 博士毕业，获中山大学工学博士学位。

news.en: Completed joint Ph.D. training at NYU Abu Dhabi.
news.zh: 完成在纽约大学阿布扎比校区的联合培养。

news.en: 🎉 Paper “A Unified Multicarrier Waveform Framework” accepted by IEEE Communications Surveys & Tutorials (IF=46.7, co-first author).
news.zh: 🎉 论文《统一多载波波形框架》被 IEEE Communications Surveys & Tutorials（IF=46.7，共一作者）录用。

news.en: Paper “Cyclic Delay-Doppler Shift for Ultra-Reliable Communications” accepted by IEEE TWC (IF=10.7).
news.zh: 论文《循环时延多普勒移位超可靠通信》被 IEEE TWC（IF=10.7）录用。

news.en: 🏆 Served as TPC Chair for 6G Key Waveform Technologies at IEEE PIMRC 2025 and received the Best Paper Award.
news.zh: 🏆 担任 IEEE PIMRC 2025 6G关键波形技术分会TPC主席，并荣获最佳论文奖。

news.en: 🌟 Received the “Yat-sen Academic Star” — SYSU’s highest graduate honor, awarded to 20 students university-wide.
news.zh: 🌟 荣获“逸仙学术之星”，中山大学研究生最高学术荣誉（全校仅20人）。

news.en: 🏅 Received First Prize for Technical Invention from the Greater Bay Area (GBA) AI & Automation Society.
news.zh: 🏅 荣获粤港澳大湾区人工智能与自动化学会技术发明一等奖。

news.en: 🎉 Paper “Ambiguity Function Analysis of AFDM Signals for ISAC” accepted by IEEE JSAC (IF=17.2), selected as Top 40 Hot Paper.
news.zh: 🎉 论文《AFDM信号模糊函数ISAC分析》被 IEEE JSAC（IF=17.2）录用，入选Top40热点论文。

news.en: Started joint Ph.D. training at NYU Abu Dhabi with CSC scholarship support.
news.zh: 赴纽约大学阿布扎比校区开展联合培养，受国家留学基金委（CSC）资助。

news.en: Presented “Evaluation and Design Criterion for Pulse-Shaped AFDM” at IEEE GLOBECOM 2024.
news.zh: 在 IEEE GLOBECOM 2024 现场报告论文《脉冲成形AFDM的评估与设计准则》。

title.en: Pilot aided channel estimation for AFDM in doubly dispersive channels
title.zh: 双弥散信道中AFDM导频辅助信道估计

summary.en: Advanced physical-layer waveform technologies for next-generation satellite communications and low-altitude wireless networks, with emphasis on doubly-dispersive channel challenges in high-mobility scenarios.
summary.zh: 面向下一代卫星通信和低空无线网络的先进物理层波形技术，重点研究高动态场景下双弥散信道挑战，致力于实现超可靠通信与高精度感知的深度融合。

body.en: Systematic research on AFDM waveforms including ambiguity function analysis, pulse shaping design, and performance evaluation in high-mobility scenarios.
body.zh: 系统研究AFDM波形，包括模糊函数分析、脉冲成形设计及高动态场景下的性能评估。

body.en: AFDM/OTFS-based ISAC waveform design and high-precision target parameter estimation algorithms in the delay-Doppler domain.
body.zh: 基于AFDM/OTFS的ISAC波形设计与时延-多普勒域高精度目标参数估计算法研究。

body.en: Cyclic Delay-Doppler Shift (CDDS) transmit diversity for doubly-dispersive channels; channel estimation and equalization for LEO satellite and UAV networks.
body.zh: 循环时延多普勒移位（CDDS）发射分集技术；面向低轨卫星与无人机网络的信道估计与均衡。

body.en: Channel modeling for high-density high-mobility scenarios; Doppler interference cancellation for MIMO-AFDM systems.
body.zh: 高密度高动态场景信道建模；MIMO-AFDM系统多普勒干扰消除。

Invited talks at Huawei Shanghai & Chengdu R&D Centers (multiple occasions) on AFDM waveform and ISAC.

多次受邀赴华为上海及成都研发中心做主题汇报，主题为AFDM波形与ISAC。

title.en: AI Large Model-Based Conflict-Free Flight for High-Density Urban Low-Altitude Scenarios
title.zh: 基于AI大模型的高密度城市低空场景无冲突飞行关键技术研究

desc.en: Channel modeling for UAV high-density scenarios; ultra-reliable MIMO communication and high-resolution sensing.
desc.zh: 研究无人机高密度高动态场景信道建模，MIMO超可靠通信与超高分辨率感知算法，服务低空经济产业。

title.en: Integrated Sensing and Communications for Complex Scenarios
title.zh: 复杂场景通信感知一体化研究

desc.en: Designed ISAC waveform physical-layer frame structures and conducted simulation verification.
desc.zh: 设计通信感知一体化波形物理层帧结构并进行仿真验证。

title.en: Multi-DOF Flexible Agile Physical-Layer Waveform Design
title.zh: 多自由度灵活捷变物理层波形设计

desc.en: Designed multi-degree-of-freedom flexible agile physical-layer waveforms.
desc.zh: 设计多自由度灵活捷变的物理层波形，探索AFDM多维参数设计空间。

title.en: Physical-Layer Secure Transmission for OTFS Systems in High-Mobility Environments
title.zh: 高速移动环境OTFS系统物理层加密传输技术

desc.en: Experimental validation of OTFS and AFDM novel waveforms.
desc.zh: 对OTFS和AFDM新型波形进行实验验证。
